title: Create preset damage type modularshoot:bullet_damage + ModularShootDamageTypes constants

reference_files.reason: Damage type system - preset modularshoot:bullet_damage, data-driven DamageType, Holder<DamageType> usage
API overview - ModularShootDamageTypes constants class with BULLET pointing to modularshoot:bullet_damage

acceptance_criteria: Damage type JSON file created at src/main/resources/data/modularshoot/damage_type/bullet_damage.json
JSON contains valid DamageType fields (exhaustion=0.0, scaling=never, effects=none, message_id or death_message_type appropriate for bullet death message)
ModularShootDamageTypes class created with ResourceKey<DamageType> BULLET constant pointing to modularshoot:bullet_damage
ModularShootDamageTypes provides helper method to resolve Holder<DamageType> from registry access (e.g. holderOrThrow via RegistryAccess)
